channel.title: Security Consolidation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Security Consolidation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: New Forrester study shows customers who unified with Microsoft Security benefited from 124% ROI
item.description:
Microsoft cites a new Forrester Total Economic Impact study saying organizations that consolidated on Microsoft Security saw a 124% ROI, lower risk, and improved readiness to secure AI. The post is a summary announcement and does not include detailed methodology or product changes.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
